title: Github Copilot "Edit" Tab is missing
author: TSR
text:
Before I used to see CHAT and EDIT in the Copilot sidebar in VSCode.
I updated the extensions to the latest, but now I only see "CHAT".
How to enable the two tabs ? How to bring it back? Why did it disappear ?
Expected Result: I should see both tabs like before
